item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 42min Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The mom
item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 42min Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 1 1 19 1 mil

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 35min En respuesta a @Fitzwilliam__ Thanks lads 2 1 426
item.description: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 35min En respuesta a @Fitzwilliam__ Thanks lads 2 1 426

item.title: JohnnyDineen: Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 10h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo app
item.description:
Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 10h All the top athletes have little siestas before their big sporting events. Ronaldo apparently takes 6 naps a day so I’ve a bit to go to catch him up !! Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 10h Update: @ JOHNNY DINEEN COUCH TO 5K
@JohnnyDineen preparing for tonight’s 5K. Only six and a half hours to go. Plenty of content to follow from the race. 39 15 724 103 mil

item.title: DanBarberTF: Daniel Barber @DanBarberTF · 5h En respuesta a @JohnnyDineen y @DylanBraith92 Noisy in prelims 2 259
item.description: Daniel Barber @DanBarberTF · 5h En respuesta a @JohnnyDineen y @DylanBraith92 Noisy in prelims 2 259
Johnny Dineen @JohnnyDineen · 35min En respuesta a @DanBarberTF y @DylanBraith92 And carrying a bit of condition Dan 1 101

item.title: TheIrishField: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 36min Success was sweeter than ever on the second and final day of the Craven Breeze Up
item.description: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 36min Success was sweeter than ever on the second and final day of the Craven Breeze Up Sale, but unfortunately luck seemed to be in short supply for vendors theirishfield.ie NEWS: Egmont achieve career best despite Craven challenges The market remained patchy on the second and final day of the Tattersalls Craven Breeze Up Sale, Amy Lynam reports from Newmarket 290

item.title: Drakesport: Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the f
item.description: Barry Drake @Drakesport · 2h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 75 41 833 67 mil
